name: gridpoint-fix
description: Markers for fixed gridpoint conditions (velocity / displacement fixity). Validated against 'plot item create gridpoint-fix ?' in FLAC2D 9.0.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the gridpoint-fix item.
Configure the color list (clear / global / label).
Deformation factor — exaggerate displacement of marker positions.
Hide markers attached to null zones.
Legend sub-keywords (active, count, heading, label, etc.).
Line-style sub-options for the fix markers.
Filter which fix markers are drawn (range elements).

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create gridpoint-fix active on legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Overlay markers at gridpoints with fixed velocity components.

notes: This item draws FIX-CONDITION markers. For continuous coloring by gridpoint field values (displacement, velocity, pore-pressure, temperature) use 'plot item create zone contour <attribute>' — the zone contour interpolates from gridpoint data.
Pore-pressure fixity has a separate item type: 'plot item create pp-fix'.
Probe live with 'plot item create gridpoint-fix ?' and 'plot item create gridpoint-fix <kw> ?'.
